feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Death Of Peace Of Mind
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,687Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 128

Summary: It’s simple: Buck hates Eddie, and Eddie hates Buck. They spend their shifts bickering and their days looking for reasons to stay out of each other's way. And yet, when the lights go off and nobody’s watching, they always find themselves in each other's orbit, taking out their frustration on each other in the dark. Or: The one where they hate each other, but they also can't get enough of each other.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: angels wouldn't help you.
entry.summary:
Author: dylaesthetics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,886Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 63

Summary: Buck thought he knew what rock bottom felt like already. Between a lightning strike, a belated dead brother acquisition, a thirty-thousand pound vehicle crushing his leg, and a goddamn tsunami, he figured he’s experienced all life has to offer. Turns out, he’d been achingly wrong. Because here he is, lonely and left behind, at three in the morning and four beers down, purchasing a ticket to a queer speed-dating event. Not just any regular ticket. No. A whole weekend getaway, the premium pack with a fancy restaurant booking and SPA included. This. This is rock bottom.______ OR in the wake of Eddie moving to El Paso, the Fallen Angel of Coquette curses Buck, forcing him to revisit memories from his past to figure out who he's in love with.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: time makes you bolder (children get older)
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,519Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: Eddie had absolutely no clue how he became the designated supervisor for every 118 child in existence at once. What he did know was that he needed backup. Specifically Buck. In more ways than he had the emotional capacity to deal with while mediating a dispute over a juice box. Maybe the kids could help them sort out the rest. Or, Buck and Eddie’s adventures in babysitting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: orbiter (i stare at you, i sing to you)
entry.summary:
Author: redchimneys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,121Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: But right now, as he is alive, laying underneath Buck in the hospital elevator. This could be it. He could bleed out, right now, despite Buck’s insistent efforts to keep him stable. He could utter the words on his lips and feel his soul chase him to hell, but with Buck’s hand on his cheek and eyes locked on his own, he wouldn’t have it any other way. Tonight, he is alive. “Buck,” he stutters, low and whisper-like. He blinks back at Buck, kneeling over him, the raw blue of his eyes and the soft pink of his lips.  And the red, the red he feels in his chest as they lay beside one another. He squeezes his hand around Buck’s, as he looks him in the eyes with all the focus he can muster. “There’s nobody in this world, I love like my son… other, than you.”   OR, speculation for 9x18 post eddie getting shot, and he gets trapped in the elevator with buck as he bleeds out (he lives I swear)

entry.title: Dear Theo what to say to you?
entry.summary:
Author: Kxk

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,817Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 151

Summary: Some fluff to prepare us for next weeks episode and to make up for yesterday's. Or, Connor and Cameron were right, Theo was a handful. (SPOILERS FOR 9-1-1 SEASON 9 EPISODE 17 AND SOME SPEC FOR SEASON 9 EPSIODE 18)

entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 253,455Chapters: 30/31Kudos: 240

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,535Chapters: 12/365Kudos: 36

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

entry.title: gonna be just fine
entry.summary:
Author: audioDramatist

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 340Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: Spec scene for 9x18, written in screenplay format. Buck and Eddie are trapped in an elevator while Eddie slowly bleeds out.                                          EDDIE                  Buck. Hey. Look at me. You’re doing everything right.                                          BUCK                  Okay, but–                                          EDDIE                  No, listen. You’re doing everything right.                  So if I don’t make it out of this–

entry.title: The Fourth Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: Vowelwrites

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,083Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 12

Summary: don’t look too close at the timelines ok pls and thank you! also i know very little about the legal system regarding this so my apologies for any and all inaccuracies 16 years ago Amanda Edwards and Peter Edwards decided they wanted to have a baby. Due to circumstances out of their control, they were unable to conceive themselves. At this time Margaret and Phillip Buckley— distant friends of Amanda and Peter— found out they were expecting another child. Evan ‘Buck’ Buckley had left by then meaning that neither him nor Maddie would have known. Unknown to either sibling, the Buckleys had a healthy baby girl that they gave to the Edwards family and forged adoption papers.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: My Dreams Are Just Dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Feybird395

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,482Chapters: 2/11Kudos: 30

Summary: Evan Buckley was nine years old the day he disappeared. It takes eleven years of hell to get the courage to escape the organisation that raised him. It'll take years more before he finally feels like a person again, for the ghosts of his past to stop haunting his every move. He becomes Buck, becomes a firefighter, finds a family, a sister, and two best friends. And then when he's thirty-one, Chris is taken. And if he wants to get him back, he'll need to face the past he thought he'd finally escaped. (OR: A Red Room, Assassin AU)

entry.title: Ten-Four, Sweetheart
entry.summary:
Author: whisperingcherries

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,597Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 230

Summary: For months, Buck has been professionally harassed over dispatch by one infuriatingly calm operator with a smug voice, a superiority complex, and a deeply concerning habit of calling him sweetheart over an active emergency line. Buck hates him. Obviously. Then he meets Eddie Diaz in person and unfortunately discovers that the smug voice comes with stupidly nice hands, unfair eye contact, and a thirteen-year-old son who immediately decides Buck is his problem now. Worse, Eddie gets weirdly possessive every time someone else looks at Buck too long. Worse than that, Buck likes it. And when a bad call turns into a building collapse and Eddie has to listen to Buck trapped beneath it over an open dispatch line, suddenly none of it feels like a joke anymore. Or: Buck and Eddie fall in love while arguing over city emergency communications, and literally everyone is tired of them.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: because you have to
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,663Chapters: 8/12Kudos: 60

Summary: After years of chaos, Buck has finally built the life he once thought was impossible: a soulmate he gets to call his husband, three kids who are his entire universe, and a new beginning in LA that feels like hope. But just when everything settles, a diagnosis shatters the illusion of safety and forces Buck to confront the fight of his life. The fic where Buck is diagnosed with cancer and has to fight for the future he always wanted — and the family that refuses to let him face it alone.

entry.summary:
Author: Thunderbirdsfirestar

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,626Chapters: 6/30Kudos: 131

Summary: Blythe and Don hart had two children Evan and Ryan hart. When Ryan was born they were in Pennsylvania for 2 weeks and Evan hart was taken after his younger brother was born. 33 years later the truth comes out when Chris get his dad and buck to do a d.n.a test.

entry.title: I’ll Never Stop Looking
entry.summary:
Author: PhantomImpala911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,612Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 14

Summary: “He took his backpack that usually has a change of clothes and a hoodie. He took a photo of his two closest friends. That’s not the actions of someone who’s -“ Bobby didn’t finish the sentence.“Then what, Bobby?” Eddie cried, the tears rolling down his face against his will. “He just willingly left us? Left me?!” A sob broke free from his chest. He dropped his head into his hand and sobbed.Or: Buck disappears without a trace. Not knowing why he left, his family works to find him and bring him home.

entry.title: i survive on what you give me
entry.summary:
Author: fallenoverbiblically

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,024Chapters: 3/20Kudos: 9

Summary: Buck's always survived on what he's given. It's enough, it feeds the thing inside of him, and he thinks that's just fine. It's not. Eddie loses a piece of himself when he moves to Texas and sets off to take it back.

entry.title: Speak Now (Eddie’s Version)
entry.summary:
Author: Gingerific

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,394Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: Eddie couldn’t help but picture himself where the older man stood, imagining how he’d be shaking like a leaf, nervous as sin, and excited as hell to be there. How he’d be smiling at his guests, his friends and family, before feeling his heart swell and his smile grow when the music changed and Buck started toward him, Maddie’s hands resting on the crook of his elbow as she prepared to give him away.He would be teary-eyed as the pair made it down to him, easily accepting Buck’s hands after Maddie kissed both their cheeks. Or: Eddie does not hold his peace when the officiant says “Speak now”.

entry.title: hold on to me
entry.summary:
Author: peachicedtea73

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,249Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 163

Summary: He must have hit the button a hundred times, something he always used to tell Chris not to do when he was a toddler, because as he said, “it’s not gonna make the elevator come any faster.” As the door opened, Eddie wasn’t exactly sure what to expect. Maybe it would be completely empty, maybe there would be some hospital staff coming down with equipment, maybe a second shooter was coming to finish the job. But as the door opened, he saw none of those things.…After being shot at a hospital, Eddie gets stuck in an elevator with Buck while the building goes on lockdown.

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,620Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 157

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

entry.title: Tower Made of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: Brixon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 278,990Chapters: 27/32Kudos: 286

Summary: Prince Evan, affectionately known as Buck, is the heir his parents never wanted. He’s abandoned all royal duties in favor of throwing outlandish parties and expensive vacations. Unfortunately, after his father steps down, Buck has to fulfill two of his most hated royal duties — kingship and marriage. OR: When Buck meets Eddie, he decides the surest way to anger his parents and the council is to marry a kitchen cook. When Eddie meets Prince Evan, he wants to know whether it would be considered treason to push a prince off of the nearest cliff.
